summary: A repost of grayscale aerial or drone targeting footage labeled 'UNCLASSIFIED' in green at the top, showing an overhead view of ground structures with targeting reticles, range readouts and smoke or explosions. The imagery is consistent with military surveillance or strike footage.

script.scene: Grayscale overhead targeting footage of ground structures with reticles and a range readout; 'UNCLASSIFIED' label at top, smoke visible.
The same overhead targeting view continues.
